title: 100% Anonymous Feedback
content: Senders are never identified. Share your honest thoughts freely — no names, no traces, just genuine insights.

title: Custom Question Sets
content: Create your own question list so respondents answer exactly what matters to you — no more vague open-ended messages.

title: AI-Powered Summaries
content: Receive dozens of responses? Let AI surface the key themes, patterns, and actionable insights across all your feedback at once.

title: Smart Message Suggestions
content: Not sure what to write? Generate AI-crafted feedback prompts tailored to the context — click one to instantly fill the form.

title: Pin, Filter & Search
content: Pin important messages, filter by Unread or Pinned, and search across all your feedback from one organized dashboard.

title: Share via Link or QR Code
content: Every user gets a unique public profile link. Generate a QR code and share it anywhere to start collecting feedback instantly.
